title: OpenAI previews new agent runtime for enterprise workflows
body: OpenAI previewed a new agent runtime aimed at enterprise workflows, adding tool permissions, memory, eval hooks, and deployment controls. Analysts said the move could reshape how companies build production AI assistants.

title: Anthropic customers report stronger adoption of tool-using agents
body: Several enterprise software teams reported stronger adoption of Claude-powered agents after adding scoped tools, review checkpoints, and explicit memory. The pattern suggests agent reliability is improving when systems constrain actions.

title: NVIDIA cloud partners warn that inference demand is outpacing GPU capacity
body: NVIDIA cloud partners warned that inference demand from AI applications is growing faster than expected. Startups building agentic workflows are reporting higher latency and increased GPU reservation costs.

title: EU AI Act compliance teams focus on model evaluation records
body: Compliance teams preparing for EU AI Act obligations are focusing on model evaluation records, incident reporting, and audit trails. Enterprise buyers are asking vendors to document safety testing before procurement.

title: AI coding assistant startup raises Series A for local developer agents
body: An AI coding assistant startup raised a Series A to build local developer agents that can read repositories, run tests, and prepare pull requests. Investors said demand is shifting from chat interfaces to autonomous task completion.
